name: Za’atar Cod with Relish
servings: serves 4 as a starter or light meal, or 2 as a main meal

ingredients.item:
2 heaped tbsp za’atar
olive oil
400g (14oz) prime cod fillet or loin, cut into either 2 or 4 pieces, or other firm white fish
sea salt
ingredients.original:
2 heaped tbsp za’atar
olive oil
400g (14oz) prime cod fillet or loin, cut into either 2 or 4 pieces, or other firm white fish
sea salt

ingredients.item:
24 Kalamata olives
6 preserved lemons
8 pickled chillies
1 small bunch of coriander
olive oil
